'''Abbela Oldsong''' was the personal aide assigned to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during her coordination of the [[Senate Select Committee for Refugees]] refugee project on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. She was killed by a [[tkun]] in the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
